description: PublishRequest containing a producer-supplied `ctx_id` MUST be rejected with schema_violation (HTTP 400). `ctx_id` is registry-assigned (RFC-ACDP-0003 §2.1 step 8) and is in the §5.7 exclusion set; the publish-request schema does not define it, and the schema is closed. A registry that silently accepts and ignores a producer-supplied `ctx_id` is non-conformant because the producer may believe they have reserved an identifier when they have not.

expected.rationale: Producer-supplied registry-assigned fields are a category of structural error: the producer cannot meaningfully sign a body that contains a field they do not control. Closed-schema rejection MUST be the consistent outcome regardless of whether the supplied value would have collided with an existing identifier.
